channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: From NBA All-Star Game to junior prom: Inside early days, setbacks and successes of Bay Area basketball star’s rehab journey
item.description: McKenna Woliczko's comeback: 'At the level that she's at, any type of injury, you're gonna have good days and bad days when the thing that you love has been taken away.
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: What injured ankle? Ja Morant flies around court helping Grizzlies take West's 8th seed
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. (AP) — Two-time All-Star Ja Morant promised a sprained right ankle wouldn't keep him out of Memphis' play-in game against Dallas with the Western Conference's last postseason berth up for grabs Friday night. Morant did more than just play.
item.dc:creator: CLAY BAILEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Grizzlies beat the Mavericks 120-106 to set up a 1st-round playoff series with the Thunder
item.description: Ja Morant shrugged off a sprained right ankle to score 22 points and add nine assists and the Memphis Grizzlies beat the Dallas Mavericks 120-106 on Friday night to advance to the NBA playoffs.
item.dc:creator: Clay Bailey, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Edman hits leadoff HR filling in for Ohtani and Yamamoto strikes out 10 as Dodgers beat Texas 3-0
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Yoshinobu Yamamoto matched his career high with 10 strikeouts over seven innings after Tommy Edman led off the game with a home run and the Los Angeles Dodgers beat the Texas Rangers 3-0 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Inside the numbers: Led by Cleveland and Oklahoma City, it was the season of the streak in the NBA
item.description: It was the year of the long winning streak in the NBA. There were five instances of teams winning 11 or more games in a row — three by Cleveland, two by Oklahoma City, and it's probably no coincidence that those two teams are the ones that earned No.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Tucker hits 2-run HR, Cubs score 6 in 8th after giving up 10 in top half to beat Diamondbacks 13-11
item.description: Kyle Tucker had the fans on their feet, roaring and pumping their fists as he rounded the bases after hitting the go-ahead two-run homer in the eighth inning.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Seligman, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: UNC employees 'not loving the Bill Belichick experience,' longtime Boston reporter says
item.description: It appears Bill Belichick is bringing his normal coaching style to UNC, and some employees aren't exactly thrilled about it, according to a report.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Shohei Ohtani away from the Los Angeles Dodgers for birth of his first child
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Shohei Ohtani is away from the Los Angeles Dodgers for the birth of the two-way superstar's first child. Manager Dave Roberts said before the Dodgers' series opener Friday night in Texas that Ohtani was with his wife. Ohtani was placed on MLB's paternity list.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah Hockey Club excited about future
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club was hoping its first season in Salt Lake City would end with a playoff berth, but they still are extremely thankful for the fan support they received in their inaugural season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Report: TJ Edwards signs extension with the Bears
item.description: The Chicago Bears have signed linebacker TJ Edwards to a two-year, $20 million extension, with $16.6 million in guaranteed money, following the extension of defensive back Kyler Gordon.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Inside Jackalopes' new identity: Humpback Chubs
item.description: On Wednesdays this summer, the Jackalopes will be the Grand Junction Humpback Chubs. A new identity for Grand Junction’s baseball team is here.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: DOJ suing Maine amid Title IX, trans athlete dispute
item.description: Maine's governor says a state law barring discrimination based on gender identity supersedes Trump's executive order.
item.dc:creator: Bobby Oler, NewsNation

item.title: Utah HC loses to St. Louis in season finale, 6-1
item.description: ST. LOUIS (ABC4 Sports) - The historic inaugural season for the Utah Hockey Club has officially come to an end. Clayton Keller scored his 30th goal of the season, but Utah could not overcome a four-goal barrage in the first period by the Blues in a 6-1 loss.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Hendricks plans to come back stronger than ever
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - This was supposed to be the season Taylor Hendricks took a big step forward. After showing promising signs his rookie year, in which he averaged 7.3 points in 40 games, Hendricks was excited to be a big part of the Jazz rebuild.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Professional soccer could be headed to the North Bay
item.description: (KRON) -- The next professional sports team in the Bay Area could be bound for the North Bay. The City of Santa Rosa announced it has entered into exclusive negotiations with the United Soccer League (USL) to explore the possibilities of bringing both a men's team and a women's team to the city.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Popular beach in San Diego County to host surfing in the 2028 Summer Olympics
item.description: All eyes will be on San Diego County's coastline this summer! LA28 recently announced a popular state beach located in North County will set the stage for surfing during the 2028 Summer Olympics in Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Nazar scores in shootout to give Blackhawks 4-3 win over Canadiens
item.description: Frank Nazar scored the only goal of the shootout, and the Chicago Blackhawks beat Montreal 4-3 on Monday night, spoiling Canadiens rookie Ivan Demidov's NHL debut.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: NBA's West spots set, with the Nuggets, Clippers and Timberwolves in and the Warriors play-in bound
item.description: The Los Angeles Clippers worked overtime to clinch a playoff spot — and send the Golden State Warriors to the NBA's play-in tournament.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Connor stars as Jets clinch Central Division title with shootout victory over Blackhawks
item.description: Kyle Connor and Cole Perfetti scored in the shootout, and the Winnipeg Jets clinched the franchise’s first Central Division title and the No. 1 seed for the Western Conference playoffs with a wild 5-4 victory over the Chicago Blackhawks on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Game 82: The end of the line for some in the NBA, decision day for others
item.description: Game 82 for every team in the NBA has arrived. For 10 clubs, it's the end of the season. For 13 others, it's one last game before the postseason. And for seven teams in the Western Conference, Game 82 might feel like Game 7.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5
